timeline_title: Timeline of Ancient Egypt
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and imperial milestones in ancient Egyptian history from state formation to the Roman annexation.
title: Unification of Upper and Lower Egypt
description: Narmer is traditionally associated with the political unification of Upper and Lower Egypt and the founding of the 1st dynasty.

timeline_title: Timeline of Ancient Egypt
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and imperial milestones in ancient Egyptian history from state formation to the Roman annexation.
title: Hieroglyphic writing emerges
description: Hieroglyphic writing becomes established as an essential instrument of royal administration, religion, and monumental display.

timeline_title: Timeline of Ancient Egypt
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and imperial milestones in ancient Egyptian history from state formation to the Roman annexation.
title: Beginning of the Old Kingdom
description: The 3rd dynasty inaugurates the Old Kingdom, a period of strong centralized rule and monumental building.

timeline_title: Timeline of Ancient Egypt
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and imperial milestones in ancient Egyptian history from state formation to the Roman annexation.
title: Step Pyramid built at Saqqara
description: Djoser's Step Pyramid, designed for the king's burial complex, marks a major advance in monumental stone architecture.

timeline_title: Timeline of Ancient Egypt
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and imperial milestones in ancient Egyptian history from state formation to the Roman annexation.
title: Great Pyramid of Khufu completed
description: The Great Pyramid at Giza is constructed as the tomb of Khufu and becomes the most famous monument of ancient Egypt.

timeline_title: Timeline of Ancient Egypt
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and imperial milestones in ancient Egyptian history from state formation to the Roman annexation.
title: Great Sphinx carved at Giza
description: The Great Sphinx is created during the pyramid age and becomes one of the most recognizable images of ancient Egypt.

timeline_title: Timeline of Ancient Egypt
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and imperial milestones in ancient Egyptian history from state formation to the Roman annexation.
title: Old Kingdom collapses
description: Royal authority fragments, beginning the First Intermediate Period of regional competition and instability.

timeline_title: Timeline of Ancient Egypt
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and imperial milestones in ancient Egyptian history from state formation to the Roman annexation.
title: Middle Kingdom reunification
description: Mentuhotep II restores political unity and launches the Middle Kingdom after the First Intermediate Period.

timeline_title: Timeline of Ancient Egypt
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and imperial milestones in ancient Egyptian history from state formation to the Roman annexation.
title: Faiyum development expands
description: Middle Kingdom rulers intensify irrigation and agricultural development in the Faiyum region.

timeline_title: Timeline of Ancient Egypt
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and imperial milestones in ancient Egyptian history from state formation to the Roman annexation.
title: Hyksos gain control in the Delta
description: Foreign rulers known as the Hyksos establish power in northern Egypt during the Second Intermediate Period.

timeline_title: Timeline of Ancient Egypt
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and imperial milestones in ancient Egyptian history from state formation to the Roman annexation.
title: New Kingdom begins
description: Ahmose I expels the Hyksos and founds the 18th dynasty, opening the era of the New Kingdom.

timeline_title: Timeline of Ancient Egypt
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and imperial milestones in ancient Egyptian history from state formation to the Roman annexation.
title: Hatshepsut assumes pharaonic rule
description: Hatshepsut consolidates power as king and sponsors major building projects and long-distance trade.

timeline_title: Timeline of Ancient Egypt
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and imperial milestones in ancient Egyptian history from state formation to the Roman annexation.
title: Thutmose III's empire reaches its height
description: Campaigns under Thutmose III extend Egyptian influence deep into the Levant and Nubia.

timeline_title: Timeline of Ancient Egypt
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and imperial milestones in ancient Egyptian history from state formation to the Roman annexation.
title: Akhenaten launches Atenist reform
description: Akhenaten promotes the Aten and overturns many traditional religious practices centered on other gods.

timeline_title: Timeline of Ancient Egypt
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and imperial milestones in ancient Egyptian history from state formation to the Roman annexation.
title: Tutankhamun comes to the throne
description: The young king's reign is associated with the restoration of traditional cults after the Amarna upheaval.

timeline_title: Timeline of Ancient Egypt
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and imperial milestones in ancient Egyptian history from state formation to the Roman annexation.
title: Ramesses II begins his reign
description: Ramesses II becomes one of Egypt's longest-ruling pharaohs and a dominant figure of the New Kingdom.

timeline_title: Timeline of Ancient Egypt
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and imperial milestones in ancient Egyptian history from state formation to the Roman annexation.
title: Battle of Kadesh fought
description: Egyptian and Hittite forces clash at Kadesh in one of the best documented battles of the ancient world.

timeline_title: Timeline of Ancient Egypt
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and imperial milestones in ancient Egyptian history from state formation to the Roman annexation.
title: New Kingdom ends
description: Central power weakens and Egypt enters the Third Intermediate Period marked by divided authority.

timeline_title: Timeline of Ancient Egypt
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and imperial milestones in ancient Egyptian history from state formation to the Roman annexation.
title: Persians conquer Egypt
description: Cambyses II defeats Egypt and incorporates it into the Achaemenid Empire.

timeline_title: Timeline of Ancient Egypt
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and imperial milestones in ancient Egyptian history from state formation to the Roman annexation.
title: Alexander the Great enters Egypt
description: Alexander takes Egypt from Persian rule and inaugurates the Hellenistic era.

timeline_title: Timeline of Ancient Egypt
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and imperial milestones in ancient Egyptian history from state formation to the Roman annexation.
title: Ptolemy I founds the Ptolemaic kingdom
description: One of Alexander's successors establishes the Greek-ruled dynasty that governs Egypt for nearly three centuries.

timeline_title: Timeline of Ancient Egypt
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and imperial milestones in ancient Egyptian history from state formation to the Roman annexation.
title: Roman annexation follows Cleopatra's death
description: After the defeat of Antony and Cleopatra, Egypt becomes a province of the Roman Empire.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Renaissance
timeline_description: Major intellectual, artistic, political, and technological milestones in the Renaissance from its Italian origins to its broader European transformation.
title: Petrarch is born
description: The birth of Petrarch, later celebrated as an early humanist, symbolizes the intellectual beginnings of Renaissance culture.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Renaissance
timeline_description: Major intellectual, artistic, political, and technological milestones in the Renaissance from its Italian origins to its broader European transformation.
title: Petrarch is crowned poet laureate
description: Petrarch's coronation in Rome marks the prestige of classical learning and literary revival.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Renaissance
timeline_description: Major intellectual, artistic, political, and technological milestones in the Renaissance from its Italian origins to its broader European transformation.
title: Black Death reshapes Europe
description: The plague devastates Europe and contributes to profound social and economic change during the era that precedes the Renaissance's expansion.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Renaissance
timeline_description: Major intellectual, artistic, political, and technological milestones in the Renaissance from its Italian origins to its broader European transformation.
title: Boccaccio completes the Decameron
description: Boccaccio's collection of stories becomes a landmark of vernacular literature and Renaissance sensibility.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Renaissance
timeline_description: Major intellectual, artistic, political, and technological milestones in the Renaissance from its Italian origins to its broader European transformation.
title: Papacy returns to Rome
description: The papal return from Avignon strengthens Rome's role in the patronage networks that help nourish Renaissance art and learning.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Renaissance
timeline_description: Major intellectual, artistic, political, and technological milestones in the Renaissance from its Italian origins to its broader European transformation.
title: Florence baptistery competition begins
description: The competition for the bronze doors of the Florence Baptistery becomes a defining moment in early Renaissance art.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Renaissance
timeline_description: Major intellectual, artistic, political, and technological milestones in the Renaissance from its Italian origins to its broader European transformation.
title: Brunelleschi develops linear perspective
description: Experiments in perspective transform pictorial space and become foundational for Renaissance visual art.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Renaissance
timeline_description: Major intellectual, artistic, political, and technological milestones in the Renaissance from its Italian origins to its broader European transformation.
title: Medici dominance in Florence begins
description: Cosimo de' Medici's political ascendancy helps make Florence the leading center of Renaissance patronage.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Renaissance
timeline_description: Major intellectual, artistic, political, and technological milestones in the Renaissance from its Italian origins to its broader European transformation.
title: Florence Cathedral dome is completed
description: Brunelleschi's dome for Santa Maria del Fiore becomes an engineering and architectural triumph of the age.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Renaissance
timeline_description: Major intellectual, artistic, political, and technological milestones in the Renaissance from its Italian origins to its broader European transformation.
title: Gutenberg perfects movable-type printing
description: Printing accelerates the spread of learning, classical texts, and new ideas across Europe.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Renaissance
timeline_description: Major intellectual, artistic, political, and technological milestones in the Renaissance from its Italian origins to its broader European transformation.
title: Fall of Constantinople
description: The Ottoman conquest of Constantinople contributes to the movement of Greek scholars and texts into western Europe.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Renaissance
timeline_description: Major intellectual, artistic, political, and technological milestones in the Renaissance from its Italian origins to its broader European transformation.
title: Birth of Botticelli's Birth of Venus era
description: By the late fifteenth century, mythological painting exemplified by Botticelli reflects the classical turn in Renaissance art.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Renaissance
timeline_description: Major intellectual, artistic, political, and technological milestones in the Renaissance from its Italian origins to its broader European transformation.
title: Columbus reaches the Americas
description: Atlantic exploration widens Europe's horizons and reshapes the world connected to Renaissance expansion.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Renaissance
timeline_description: Major intellectual, artistic, political, and technological milestones in the Renaissance from its Italian origins to its broader European transformation.
title: Leonardo paints The Last Supper
description: Leonardo da Vinci's mural becomes one of the defining works of High Renaissance art.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Renaissance
timeline_description: Major intellectual, artistic, political, and technological milestones in the Renaissance from its Italian origins to its broader European transformation.
title: Leonardo begins the Mona Lisa
description: The portrait becomes one of the best-known works associated with High Renaissance painting.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Renaissance
timeline_description: Major intellectual, artistic, political, and technological milestones in the Renaissance from its Italian origins to its broader European transformation.
title: Michelangelo begins Sistine Chapel ceiling
description: The papal commission produces one of the supreme achievements of Renaissance art.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Renaissance
timeline_description: Major intellectual, artistic, political, and technological milestones in the Renaissance from its Italian origins to its broader European transformation.
title: Machiavelli completes The Prince
description: The treatise becomes one of the most influential works of Renaissance political thought.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Renaissance
timeline_description: Major intellectual, artistic, political, and technological milestones in the Renaissance from its Italian origins to its broader European transformation.
title: Reformation begins
description: Martin Luther's challenge to the Catholic Church transforms the religious world shaped by Renaissance humanism and print culture.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Renaissance
timeline_description: Major intellectual, artistic, political, and technological milestones in the Renaissance from its Italian origins to its broader European transformation.
title: Copernicus publishes De revolutionibus
description: The heliocentric argument becomes a pivotal moment in Renaissance science.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Renaissance
timeline_description: Major intellectual, artistic, political, and technological milestones in the Renaissance from its Italian origins to its broader European transformation.
title: Michelangelo dies
description: The death of Michelangelo symbolically marks the end of the High Renaissance generation.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Vietnam War
timeline_description: Major military, political, and diplomatic events in the Vietnam War from the end of French colonial rule to the fall of Saigon.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Vietnam War

timeline_title: Timeline of the Vietnam War

description: The decisive Viet Minh victory ends France's ability to continue the war in Indochina.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Vietnam War
timeline_description: Major military, political, and diplomatic events in the Vietnam War from the end of French colonial rule to the fall of Saigon.
title: Geneva Accords divide Vietnam
description: The Geneva settlement temporarily partitions Vietnam at the 17th parallel pending elections.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Vietnam War
timeline_description: Major military, political, and diplomatic events in the Vietnam War from the end of French colonial rule to the fall of Saigon.
title: South Vietnam proclaims republic
description: Ngo Dinh Diem consolidates power and establishes the Republic of Vietnam in the south.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Vietnam War
timeline_description: Major military, political, and diplomatic events in the Vietnam War from the end of French colonial rule to the fall of Saigon.

description: The Viet Cong emerges as the principal insurgent force opposing the South Vietnamese government.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Vietnam War
timeline_description: Major military, political, and diplomatic events in the Vietnam War from the end of French colonial rule to the fall of Saigon.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Vietnam War
timeline_description: Major military, political, and diplomatic events in the Vietnam War from the end of French colonial rule to the fall of Saigon.

description: A military coup topples Ngo Dinh Diem amid deepening instability in South Vietnam.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Vietnam War
timeline_description: Major military, political, and diplomatic events in the Vietnam War from the end of French colonial rule to the fall of Saigon.

description: Naval incidents in the Gulf of Tonkin lead to a major expansion of US war powers.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Vietnam War
timeline_description: Major military, political, and diplomatic events in the Vietnam War from the end of French colonial rule to the fall of Saigon.

description: The United States launches a sustained bombing campaign against North Vietnam.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Vietnam War
timeline_description: Major military, political, and diplomatic events in the Vietnam War from the end of French colonial rule to the fall of Saigon.

description: The arrival of Marines marks the start of large-scale US ground combat operations.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Vietnam War
timeline_description: Major military, political, and diplomatic events in the Vietnam War from the end of French colonial rule to the fall of Saigon.

description: The battle becomes a major early test of US airmobile tactics against North Vietnamese forces.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Vietnam War

timeline_title: Timeline of the Vietnam War

timeline_title: Timeline of the Vietnam War
timeline_description: Major military, political, and diplomatic events in the Vietnam War from the end of French colonial rule to the fall of Saigon.

description: President Lyndon B. Johnson announces a bombing halt in part of North Vietnam and declines to seek reelection.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Vietnam War
timeline_description: Major military, political, and diplomatic events in the Vietnam War from the end of French colonial rule to the fall of Saigon.

description: The Nixon administration starts shifting combat responsibility to South Vietnamese forces while reducing US troop levels.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Vietnam War
timeline_description: Major military, political, and diplomatic events in the Vietnam War from the end of French colonial rule to the fall of Saigon.

description: US and South Vietnamese forces enter Cambodia in an effort to disrupt communist sanctuaries.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Vietnam War
timeline_description: Major military, political, and diplomatic events in the Vietnam War from the end of French colonial rule to the fall of Saigon.
title: Easter Offensive is launched
description: North Vietnam mounts a major conventional offensive, prompting intense US air response.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Vietnam War
timeline_description: Major military, political, and diplomatic events in the Vietnam War from the end of French colonial rule to the fall of Saigon.
title: Paris Peace Accords are signed
description: The agreement provides for a cease-fire and the withdrawal of remaining US forces.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Vietnam War
timeline_description: Major military, political, and diplomatic events in the Vietnam War from the end of French colonial rule to the fall of Saigon.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of India

timeline_title: Timeline of the United Nations

timeline_description: Major diplomatic, institutional, peacekeeping, and global governance milestones in the history of the United Nations.

timeline_title: Timeline of the United Nations
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, institutional, peacekeeping, and global governance milestones in the history of the United Nations.

timeline_title: Timeline of the United Nations
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, institutional, peacekeeping, and global governance milestones in the history of the United Nations.

timeline_description: Major diplomatic, institutional, peacekeeping, and global governance milestones in the history of the United Nations.

timeline_title: Timeline of the United Nations
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, institutional, peacekeeping, and global governance milestones in the history of the United Nations.

timeline_title: Timeline of the United Nations
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, institutional, peacekeeping, and global governance milestones in the history of the United Nations.

timeline_title: Timeline of the United Nations
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, institutional, peacekeeping, and global governance milestones in the history of the United Nations.

timeline_description: Major diplomatic, institutional, peacekeeping, and global governance milestones in the history of the United Nations.

timeline_description: Major diplomatic, institutional, peacekeeping, and global governance milestones in the history of the United Nations.

timeline_title: Timeline of the United Nations

timeline_title: Timeline of the United Nations

title: Convention on the Rights of the Child is adopted

timeline_title: Timeline of the United Nations
